title: European Companies Launch the Alliance to Accelerate Decarbonisation Through the H2Med Southwestern Hydrogen Corridor
content: European companies, including CIP, DH2 Energy, EnagÃ¡s, and thyssenkrupp, have launched an Alliance to accelerate decarbonization through the H2Med Southwestern Hydrogen Corridor. Spanning Portugal, Spain, France, and Germany, this initiative aims to establish a trans-European hydrogen ecosystem by the early 2030s, supporting industrial decarbonization and the European Green Deal. The Alliance focuses on connecting hydrogen production, storage, and consumption, promoting hard-to-abate sectors, and reinforcing supply and demand integration. Members will collaborate on strategic projects, including pipelines like H2Med and HY-FEN, with periodic meetings to drive synergy and growth.
author: Analysts Account
